review_question: Are categories, hierarchy, alternatives, and revisions documented?
Are required fields, validation rules, and provenance fields defined?
Are retrieval quality, ranking signals, and failure cases reviewed?
Do internal links support learning, navigation, and conceptual clarity?
Do recommendations widen understanding rather than merely optimize engagement?
Are stale content, broken links, duplicates, and metadata gaps reviewed?
Can human editors approve, revise, reject, and document algorithmic suggestions?
